articles.title: ApeCoin could dump this marketplace after BAYC proposal voting begins
articles.description: The ApeCoin [APE] Decentralized Autonomous Organization (DAO) has taken steps towards providing an APE-powered NFT marketplace. At press time, it was observed that voting had begun proper on all proposals submitted earlier. Recall that there had been three proposals from three different entities centered around developing a marketplace for Bored Ape Yacht Club [BAYC]. First […]

articles.title: Binance partners with Ukrainian supermarket chain to accept crypto through Pay Wallet.
articles.description: Customers who use the Binance Pay Wallet to pay for their orders will be eligible to enter a rewards program.

articles.title: ApeCoin Treasury Set to Unlock 25 Million APE Tokens for Launch Contributors
articles.description: APE is down about 9% today ahead of a significant token unlock for launch contributors—but staking is also on the horizon.

articles.title: You Can Now Use Shiba Inu (SHIB) to Pay at 90 Million Merchants with Binance Card
articles.description: Meme cryptocurrency Shiba Inu (SHIB) continues to see growing adoption, with Binance's pilot card in Argentina now supporting it

articles.title: Why Cardano (ADA) Could Be Registering Another Decline, Analyst Explains
articles.description: Cardano faces a new obstacle with the impending Vasil update. Analyst and futures trader Peter Brandt predicts poor performance for the coin based on current trends and projections. He recently tweeted on the present state of affairs for Cardano. “This is a fractal chart pattern called a descending triangle.
